name: pi-claude-sandbox
description_en: Claude-style OS-level sandboxing for pi with interactive permission prompts. Coexists with pi-tool-display and other bash-overriding extensions. Forked from carderne/pi-sandbox.
description_zh: pi 的 Claude 风格操作系统级沙盒，具有交互式权限提示。与 pi-tool-display 和其他覆盖 bash 的扩展共存。从 carderne/pi-sandbox 分支。
